contact.name: William John Marceau Jr.
contact.relocation: Not currently relocating — housing committed through August 2027. Open to remote, hybrid, or roles within driving distance of Naples, FL (SW Florida region). Open to business travel as required by role.

summaries.software_engineer: Full-stack software engineer with production experience building AI-integrated platforms. Founded technical consultancy delivering Python-based automation systems, MCP servers, and REST APIs serving multiple clients. Background in biomedical engineering brings systematic approach to complex system design and rigorous testing practices.
summaries.ai_ml_engineer: AI/ML engineer specializing in LLM integration and intelligent automation systems. Built production MCP servers connecting AI agents to real-world services, with experience in ML pipelines, time-series analysis, and prompt engineering. Combines software engineering rigor with deep understanding of AI agent architectures.
summaries.technical_lead: Technical founder with experience architecting multi-tier platforms and leading AI-augmented development workflows. Designed DOE (Directive-Orchestration-Execution) architecture pattern managing 10+ interconnected projects. Strong background in system design, API architecture, and cross-functional delivery.
summaries.product_manager: Technical product manager with hands-on engineering experience and business acumen. Founded consultancy achieving 80%+ efficiency gains for clients through AI-powered automation. Skilled at translating technical capabilities into business outcomes, with experience in roadmap planning, metrics definition, and stakeholder communication.
summaries.instrumentation_tech: Instrumentation & Electrical Technician with recent field experience at Collier County Wastewater Utilities and a B.S. in Biomedical Engineering from FGCU (3.8 GPA, Honors). Hands-on with PLC and SCADA troubleshooting, loop calibration, P&ID interpretation, and CMMS-driven preventative maintenance programs. Founder of a software consultancy delivering production automation, monitoring, and reporting pipelines — bringing a documentation-first, data-driven mindset to maintenance and reliability work.
summaries.controls_engineer: Controls engineer with a B.S. in Biomedical Engineering from FGCU (3.8 GPA, Honors). Recent field experience at Collier County Wastewater Utilities — hands-on PLC troubleshooting, SCADA, loop calibration, and P&ID-driven diagnostics on operating utility infrastructure. Background includes three years as a Controls Engineering Teaching Assistant at FGCU (PLC programming, ladder logic, sensor calibration, PID fundamentals), biomedical instrumentation maintenance at NCH Baker Hospital, and founding a software consultancy that ships Python automation systems end-to-end.
summaries.biomedical_specialist: Biomedical Engineer with hands-on hospital instrumentation experience and a B.S. in Biomedical Engineering from FGCU (3.8 GPA, Honors). Field experience calibrating and troubleshooting 50+ critical medical devices at NCH Baker Hospital under FDA/ISO 13485 compliance, plus medical-device manufacturing quality work at Insulet Corporation (Omnipod). Published biomedical design work including an adaptive upper-limb prosthesis presented at BMES 2020 and the American Academy of Orthotists & Prosthetists 2021. Comfortable communicating with clinical staff and clinical environments, with documentation-first methodology built across healthcare, utility, and industrial settings.
summaries.technical_sales: Technical sales / applications engineer with a B.S. in Biomedical Engineering from FGCU and founder of a Python-based automation consultancy delivering B2B technical services. Combines engineering depth (PLC/SCADA, biomedical instrumentation, controls design) with client-facing experience translating technical capabilities into measurable customer outcomes. Comfortable in pre-sales technical demos, customer training, post-sale support, and cross-functional collaboration with engineering, product, and marketing teams.
